We're competitive
We'll show you

[5]

Did we order it wrong?
Can we add more food?
Will Tzuyang win this battle?

[5 virtuosos in Suwon's Gwonseon Market]
[Tzuyang X 5daejang] [In Suwon]
Hello everyone
I'm here today with KT 5daejang athletes
A brief introduction, please
Should I start it off?
Hello~
I'm Kang Baekho, the Power Boss
[Power Boss, Kang Baekho]
Hello, I'm Heo Hoon, the Operations Boss
[Operations Boss, Heo Hoon]
I'm So Hyungjoon, the Speed Boss Nice to meet you
[Speed Boss, So Hyungjoon]
I'm Yang Hongseok, the Health Boss
[Health Boss, Yang Hongseok]
[Technique Boss, Lee Gangin]

[Operations Boss, Heo Hoon]
[Power Boss, Kang Baekho]
[Speed Boss, So Hyungjoon]
[Health Boss, Yang Hongseok]
[5daejang] [Run 5,000km]
I'm here with KT 5daejang athletes to meet with a very generous restaurant owner
Let's head inside
Hello~!
Dakdoritang That looks delicious
4 people eat 1 of these
[How about 12 of those for us?]
We've been told that you do very nice deeds for the community
Well just... charity work
[Nayeon Restaurant is filled with charity certifications]
[But what's with money taped on the ceiling?]
[This video was filmed in compliance with COVID-19 quarantine guidelines]

I'm here with 5daejang people
They have a 5th member
But he could not attend because he's in Spain
So I prepared a video call with him
Let's call that guy He's living the easy life
[Technique Boss, Lee Gangin]
Do you know who I am?
Yes, I saw you on YouTube
You're so frozen up
[Well...]
I'm sorry, but hurry and talk
Hi Gangin
-How have you been? -Hello Hoon hyung
I'm not too good at talking
Just have confidence They will edit it well for us
I wanted to be there, but I couldn't

So please shine a light on 5daejang for me
Thank you
We will shine as bright as ever
I wish to get a chance to do it together when I go back to Korea
Are you sleepy?
We only focused on sports
I will take part in running 5,000km total for our team away from Korea
Let's run together when I'm back in Korea
Cheers to 2022's new season of 5daejang
Fighting!
Let's run together!
[Thank you for the video call!]
The restaurant owner here is known for doing a lot of charity work
I will do my best to fill in for Mr. Lee Gangin to raise the sales today
Let's shoot the sales through the roof
Baekho will eat 15 servings alone

Well, yeah about that much
I'll do my best
This belly took effort
How many chickens can you eat?
I can eat up to 4 chickens
No, he orders 4
And tastes 1 of each flavor
How many can you eat, Tzuyang?
I'm not too good at eating chicken
5 chickens...?
That's not bad at all
We can beat that
Then shall we battle?
Let's do it
We're competitive
We'll show you

[I'll show you too]
[What Nayeon Restaurant's Dakdoritang is] (Spicy Chicken Stew)
I'm nervous now
I can't eat when I'm nervous
How many excuses are you making?
[Just in case he can't eat well]
This is 4 servings?
[All of this...?]
[There's no way]
[That's a piece of cake]
Wait, Are you sure this is our order?
[This can't be it]
[All standing]
[And froze up]
Our whole team can't even finish this
All the food is out now

I've been told this is a total of 50 servings
-50 servings? -Yes, 50
So 10 servings each person?
That's not bad at all
Should we order more?
The athletes will win
No, Tzuyang will win
Will she be able to win?
I'm more starstruck to meet Tzuyang than any other celebrity
Talk freely These people are all young
Born in 2001
1997 for me
I'm 1997 as well
I'm older
1995 here
Well, I'm 1989

Don't lie, you're 1979
Okay, I'm 1999
Say "Baekho, that's all you've got? Eat more"
Please do
The reason why we need to eat well today
Is because we as 5daejang need to run 5,000km for 50 million Koreans
If we do succeed by this year, we are donating 50 Million Won to Korea
This is the beginning for us, so if you can help us start on the right track
Does this have to do with the km?
50,000 Won for 1 chicken
So 500,000 Won total Which means that we get 50km
We have a long way to go
I don't know who came up with the idea
[Not me]
5daejang runs to help small business owners
We plan to continue this throughout the year

Alright we got this
Let's try to get 100km today
Easy!
Since we have you
Maybe it's a good thing that Gangin is not here
Bon appetit
[They're all surprised by the size]
[The drumstick fills up the whole bowl]
Is this chicken?
It was bulking
It's so angry
That's really yummy
I'm from Suwon and I had no idea
Yeah, how come we didn't know about this place?
[Coach Heo Jae (Heo Hoon's father)]
I've never had chicken this good Really

This chicken walked on its toes
[Bulked up]
She already finished one
[Forreal?]
[5daejang speeding things up]
PD: Do you think the 4 of you guys can win?
Looks like it We already won
[Won't let that happen]
Look at the wing
I'm sure this chicken flew
[lol]
Keep making her laugh so she can't eat
I'm full
Really?
[Fallen after 2 drumsticks]
Did you see what he did?

He ate 1 leg And said "I'm finished with 1 chicken"
"1 chicken cleared"
[2 legs is your max]
I'm on my 2nd chicken
I'm not just saying this for the camera
But this is the best chicken I've ever had
The chicken is not tough at all
And the soup is really good
This has to be an ostrich
The bigger the chicken, the tougher and drier the meat
But these are very meaty and tender
Eat a lot
You eat a lot
[I will do my best]
You know when you ate at the steakhouse
-The Wolfgang owner came out -Right, you saw it?

[New York Wolfgang Steakhouse Mukbang]
Yes, Wolfgang Steak!
You cut the steak with the knife
[I mean, of course]
[He's a real fan]
I really watched everything
Hey, continue eating
Why're you so slow?
I'm full
I'm seriously full
[I'll continue]
PD: Are you really full?
But it's 50 servings of chicken at 10 in the morning
Mmm yummy
[Forced]
Protein

You barely ate
I'm on my 4th chicken now
[More like 4 pieces]
What are you most good at eating?
That's a good question!
Beef for me
Me too!
I ate 4kg before
So if we eat 1kg each
We could've won
I can easily devour beef
You're so confident
How many servings is 1kg?
5~6 servings
No way
You can't eat 5 servings of beef

I can
I ate a little because you were paying
No, you ate more because he's paying
The total came out to be 900,000 Won
This pig ate the most
That's uncalled for
That can scar me
I'm eating and you call me a pig
How are you 2 close with different athletic backgrounds?
We came in together
He has a great personality, but
I match it to him
[What]
[Say it right...]
[5daejang has been through a lot together to get this close]
There was this guy that wanted to go into baseball But his family was not doing too well

So we went to teach him some baseball and helped him out
[They went to give the kids hope and not give up on their dreams]
We told them small little tips
And had a great time Very nostalgic for me too
We gave hope to the little ones last year
And this year, we want to visit small business owners that are struggling because of the pandemic
To give a meaning to a fresh start together
[Clicks]
You joined us to begin this season
[The sound that broke all emotions]
It keeps getting stuck
We are doing 5,000km
-And we are honored to begin this journey with you -The pleasure is mine
We're doing a good deed together
Although we started this off as a competition
But I honestly think we know who will win

It's wrong for us to win this battle
All jokes aside, let's enjoy the food and have a good time
Yes, I love that
Enjoy!
Is it because you guys will lose?
No, we're going easy on her
I haven't even started
How full are you?
Be honest
I took my gloves off
[K.O.]
How about you?
I don't feel anything
I have another question
I'm the Question Bot
What can you not eat? Something you struggle to eat

Almost all vegetables
I like eating meat
You're a carnivore
[Telling her not to be a picky eater]
Let's all finish this strong
How much did you eat?
[Let's check]
Yours is on that side
We've been putting ours here
He's acting like he ate all of that
But that's from all 3 of us?
I was kinda proud of how much we ate
I ate this much alone
He's the real one
Your father came here to give donations
Yes, didn't my dad put his money on the ceiling too?

[Customers post money on the ceiling and the owner makes a bigger donation]
He wanted to post 1 himself, but he couldn't
So he used a stick
He can't jump
Don't think you can either
Me? I dunk balls
More than enough
Do it with a good heart because it's going to good places
It's morning, that's why I don't jump at this hour
Jump now?
PD: Can you guys give him some attention?
I'm doing this
Hongseok doesn't even need to jump
[Standing up]
[So easy]
You're doing it for a good cause, but I hate seeing you flex like that

Hyungjoon's turn
How tall are you?
187cm
[Simple]
But why am I last?
This is going to be funny
[I'm an athlete...]
[All 5daejang players succeeded]
You can step on me
Tzuyang, over here
Wait...
This is normal It's okay
But she jumped like this much
Let's have the players help Tzuyang
Well then, excuse me
[For 5km!]

[My back...]
[25km added]
How many games do you play a week?
2~3 times for basketball
6 times for baseball
Because basketball is much harder than baseball
[What?!]
I'm sorry but I agree
The sports itself is exhausting, but baseball players play more games
I feel like it's a lot more burden mentally
Every day is like a test for us
So it can get very stressful in that sense
[Let's relieve that stress with chicken]
It's on KT if we throw up later in our games
-You're playing today? -Yes, at 3
Don't eat too much then

Thank you
I will eat the leftovers I will take them home
All the good parts are gone though
He ate all the legs
And he was going for the wings
Now it's all breasts
No rice cake either
Do you like chicken breast?
Not really
She doesn't
5,000km is a lot When will you be able to finish that?
Since we're all sports athletes
there are other ways to get our km through other sports missions and points
I think it'll be pretty quick
Let's say you do 5 hits per game
I would love that

You score 50 points each game then
Let's eat a lot
Yeah, eat a lot
Since Tzuyang helped us
We need to pay her back
Do you have a signature reaction move?
Like a ceremony? Since you're a streamer
He will do it as a score ceremony
Really?
I can't score
He will eat a drumstick as a ceremony
I say bye like this
So score 1 and do this?
You can get 1 safety hit and do this
Do that for her next time
Let's cheer up

Sorry, but we've been eating
Tzuyang...
She's not stopping
It's her job so she has to
I really love eating
[Right, he's a rice cake killer]
[He's really eating just the drumsticks and rice cake]
Do you have any questions?
Oh, right
Give her a good one
There's this thing called the 'perilla leaf controversy'
What do you think about that? Since it's related to food
[Good question again]
[What is the Perilla Leaf Controversy?]
So let's say that my girlfriend
If my girlfriend helps my guy friend take the perilla leaves stuck together with her chopsticks

Is that okay or no?
But I think if he's a good friend, then I think it's okay
Can you?
Nope
[Perilla Leaf]
I'll act as your bf
And he's the good friend
Let's act this out really quick
Cue!
Why's this not coming off?
What are you doing?
Here
No, Tzuyang was supposed to do it [Became a bromance]
Action
-Is it good? -Yes
You like it?

[And the friend is struggling with the leaf]
[And the girlfriend helps him]
[Is it okay?]
So that was it...
How did you feel about that as a bf?
It's a little weird, but it's okay
Right, if the friend is Baekho, it's okay
[He's in the safe]
You're savage today
What is it about me?
No, it's not like that
[He's sad]
[It's a joke]
Conclusion: Just eat both leaves
[All eaten by Tzuyang]
I hope that the viewers didn't feel uncomfortable about our tension today

We're not usually like this
Except for this guy
It's such an honor to watch her eat in person
You guys ate more than I thought
We didn't think so either, but it was so good
I really envy the fact that you enjoy eating this much food
It's good to do what you enjoy
How about you then?
[Kang Baekho, doesn't like his job]
You had enough
Stop eating
I respect you
We specifically chose this restaurant not only because it's tasty,
but also because the owner is known to do a lot of charity work and donations
[Thank you]
Let's bring her out here

I feel so safe sitting here
[Lots of charity and donation works done]
This is the 'ceiling donation'
Customers started posting money on the wall as a tip because the food was that good
They posted it as a tip
And I turned it into donations for 10+ years now
It started as a relay
I take them to add into my donations about 3 times a year
A customer started this trend
The money is getting bigger every year
Good influence is contagious
Things aren't too good because of the pandemic
Did that have an effect on you?
Everyone is struggling
We're all hanging on, but it's hard
We had a great meal Thank you

Can we get some to-go?
I want to serve this to my team
I don't think I can eat my mom's Dakdoritang anymore after today
Sorry, mom!
This is the beginning of 5daejang's new season
I love that we started it off with a great restaurant, a great owner, and great food
We did 50km today, right?
-Don't you think we need more? -PD: Also the donations
[25km of donations]
That's 25km?
So a total of 75km
Is there a way to get it to 100km?
It's a shame
Is there a way? We want 100km today
There's a way
Stir-fried squid and stir-fried pork

Eat more...?!
[So we got a 300km mission offer]
Give it to us
[2 tries per person] [Baseball players=strike] [Basketball players=score]
Fighting!
I have to hit '500'?
As long as it's on it
I'm very nervous
[1st try]
[Fail]
[2nd try]
[Can he do it...?]
[Score!]
[That was a close one]
[Now for basketball]
Can I block it?

That's in
[Got it on his first try]
[He called it before the ball even went in]
I had so much fun with KT 5daejang today
And we got to finish this off with a total of 300km today
I love it Nice nice
It's not big, but we will do our best to give as much help as we can
5daejang will be the helping hand for those in need So please keep an eye on us
5daejang! Fighting!
[Giving 5daejang aprons to the small business owners]
[We handed out 200 aprons in Suwon Gwonseon Market]
5daejang is here to support our small business owners!
Thank you for the support Thank you!
[Watch 5daejang run for South Korea this year!]
There is a quick event
If you dine-in or to-go from Nayeon Restaurant or anywhere in Gwonseon Market,

And post a pic with hashtag on Instagram,
We will pick 50 winners to give out 10,000 Onnuri gift currency
So please show support
